query: SELECT a.id, a.name, a.email, a.externalId, a.consultorId, a.bypassOnboarding, a.cadastradoPorAdmin FROM alunos a WHERE a.consultorId IN (SELECT id FROM consultors WHERE name LIKE '%Adriana%');
